metadata.title: Agence4IA - Switch to AI. We handle the rest.
metadata.description: Agence4IA helps businesses with their digital transformation through artificial intelligence. AI training and integration of AI solutions to automate your business.

hero.tagline: Switch to AI. We handle the rest.
hero.subtitle: Learn AI or let us automate your business with custom AI solutions.

about.title: ABOUT
about.heading: Who we are
about.description: Agence4IA was born from the belief that artificial intelligence should be accessible to everyone. We support entrepreneurs, SMEs and professionals in their digital transformation, whether through training or the integration of customized AI solutions.
about.mission: Our mission: democratize AI and enable everyone to gain productivity, efficiency and creativity.

learnAI.title: LEARN AI
learnAI.heading: AI Training
learnAI.subtitle: Master the AI tools revolutionizing the world of work
learnAI.description: Our online training allows you to acquire the skills needed to effectively use artificial intelligence in your professional daily life.
learnAI.target: For whom? Employees, entrepreneurs, students, professionals wanting to master AI tools.

integration.title: AI INTEGRATION
integration.heading: AI Solutions for your business
integration.subtitle: Automate and optimize your business with AI
integration.description: We integrate custom artificial intelligence solutions to transform and automate your business processes. Monthly subscription, no commitment.

process.auditDesc: Analysis of your needs and processes

integration.target: For whom? Startups and SMEs looking to automate their business.

post1.title: How AI is transforming small businesses in 2025
post1.excerpt: Discover how artificial intelligence is revolutionizing the daily life of SMEs and entrepreneurs, from task automation to improving customer experience.

post2.title: The 5 best AI tools to automate your business
post2.excerpt: Our selection of the most powerful artificial intelligence tools to save time and boost your daily productivity.

post3.excerpt: AI is evolving rapidly. Here's why it's crucial to train now to stay competitive in the job market.
